query_title: Pastoral: To Die in the Country

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.

recommendations.title: Closet Monster
recommendations.overview: A creative and driven teenager is desperate to escape his hometown and the haunting memories of his turbulent childhood.

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: Archive
recommendations.overview: 2038: George Almore is working on a true human-equivalent AI, and his latest prototype is almost ready. This sensitive phase is also the riskiest as he has a goal that must be hidden at all costs—being reunited with his dead wife.

recommendations.title: The Seventh Seal
recommendations.overview: When disillusioned Swedish knight Antonius Block returns home from the Crusades to find his country in the grips of the Black Death, he challenges Death to a chess match for his life. Tormented by the belief that God does not exist, Block sets off on

recommendations.title: Nine Days
recommendations.overview: A bureaucrat interviews five souls to decide which of them will be given a life on Earth. But he soon faces an existential challenge of his own.

recommendations.title: The Fabelmans
recommendations.overview: Growing up in post-World War II era Arizona, young Sammy Fabelman aspires to become a filmmaker as he reaches adolescence, but soon discovers a shattering family secret and explores how the power of films can help him see the truth.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: Jean de Florette
recommendations.overview: In a rural French village, an old man and his only remaining relative cast their covetous eyes on an adjoining vacant property. They need its spring water for growing their flowers, and are dismayed to hear that the man who has inherited it is moving

recommendations.title: Almost Adults
recommendations.overview: A film about growing apart when growing up. Two best friends relationship strains when one deals with her newfound sexuality and the other with breaking up with her long term boyfriend.
